---
title: "test_muninn_naming_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_muninn_naming_empire.py"
loc: 28
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.50
style_score: 3.96
intel_score: 4.26
overall_score: 4.00
---

## Intent
The `test_muninn_naming_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_muninn_run_instantiation. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_muninn_run_instantiation. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)

### Exports
- `test_muninn_run_instantiation`
